## What this adds or changes

<!-- One sentence describing the entry. -->

## Which kind

- [ ] New skill (`skills/{id}.yml`)
- [ ] New agent (`agents/{id}.yml`)
- [ ] Update to an existing entry (version bumped)

## Checklist

- [ ] Filename matches the `id` field (e.g. `skills/debug.yml` has `id: debug`)
- [ ] `system` prompt is tight and opinionated — no generic AI filler
- [ ] Ran `npm run validate` locally and it passed
- [ ] Tested in a real editor session (paste output or a screenshot if useful)
- [ ] The entry does not duplicate an existing one
